name: The Pact (Bloodbound)
description: All units start with +10% HP. When a unit dies, all allies gain +3 ATK and +3 MATK for the rest of the battle.
notes: target_selector 'all_allies' on a session-scoped effect reads payload.live_units -- battle_manager.gd needs to publish that list on death (wiring item 9 in combat_hooks.gd) or this trigger has nothing to apply to.
